title: Endium +
description: An addon for those who need an extra challenge in Paladium
body:
[![Buy Me a Coffee](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1325177951959908459/1402680032517689544/b888841adf2a7d4d76c5274d634c205ee88e9e20.png?ex=6894cb14&is=68937994&hm=d424db24d25bc696865d68997c3f4c650789a7afe2a0b4c17a543b2d6393938f&)]([URL_DU_LIEN](https://buymeacoffee.com/silwox)) [![Join Discord](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1325177951959908459/1402679847234441288/de7f2f606702569cd98fc1f6a0b29dbf817dd870.png?ex=6894cae8&is=68937968&hm=71c7461b965caaeccc1d59bfc2b0fd887535b9bf1dd21204b16f4448d316c4d4&)](https://discord.gg/jVGq5aZ6Wc)
# PROJECT ARCHIVED
his project has been archived due to lack of ideas and lack of time. I prefer to devote myself to my other big projects. In addition, ATZRsniper21 doesn't talk to me much anymore, it's basically with him that I'm carrying out the project.
# Palamod WARN 🔴🛠️
**This mod is an addon of SILWOX Palamod !!!**
[use the palamod](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladium)
You are looking for a new challenge for an armor even more powerful than the Endium already available this mod and perfect for you it adds a brand new special ingot called Solaryte which contains an improvement for the endium which therefore gives
## SOLARYTE ✅
- Solaryte Helmet
- Solaryte Chestplate
- Solaryte Leggings
- Solaryte Boots
- Solaryte Sword

This mod is community based, your opinions interest us if you can go [here](https://discord.gg/cupMzZEmMJ)

### Craft
To craft this armor you need the smithing template the same as to improve the diamond in netherite then you will need the same table where we improve the netherite
